hooks.command: FILE="$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH"; if [ -n "$FILE" ] && echo "$FILE" | grep -q '.swift$'; then xcrun swift-format format --in-place "$FILE" 2>/dev/null || true; fi

printf '{"systemMessage": "CONTEXT COMPACTED. Re-read the project CLAUDE.md before continuing. Key reminders: (1) Verify work before claiming done (2) Use project conventions and patterns (3) Check current state of code before making assumptions."}'

if [ -f Package.swift ]; then swift build 2>&1 | tail -5; elif [ -f package.json ]; then npm run build 2>&1 | tail -5; elif [ -f requirements.txt ] || [ -f pyproject.toml ]; then python3 -m py_compile $(git diff --name-only HEAD -- '*.py' | head -5) 2>&1 || true; fi
